case_title: CHASE BANK USA, N.A. VS. GUI YU et al

docket_entries.description: ASSOCIATION OF ATTORNEYS: OSTERMAN, PETER R ADDED AS ATTORNEY FOR CHASE BANK USA, N.A.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A. SERVED MAR-31-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT YU, GUI
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF OCT-08-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT YU, GUI DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-20-2010
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A. ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT YU, GUI
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT OF ENTIRE CASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1385 SET FOR OCT-08-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
